items.name_en: M81153 Blue New Aerogram Brazza Wallet Emphasizing the delicate texture of grained calfskin, with a low-key metal letter brand stamp. Compartments and card slots hold cash, documents, and coins, matching the Aerogram series handbags. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M66540 Heart Flower BRAZZA Wallet This Brazza wallet made of Monogram canvas exudes an unstoppable masculine aura. Spacious and fully functional, it easily fits into a coat pocket. Holds coins, credit cards, and bills. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm

items.name_en: M69029💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To celebrate the brand's precious heritage, Louis Vuitton Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh crafted this Brazza wallet using the brand's iconic materials: a combination of Monogram coated canvas and smooth natural calfskin. This wallet is highly functional with many compartments to hold all necessities of modern daily life. Dimensions: 10.0 x 19.0 x 2.0 cm ~

items.name_en: M69024💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To continue paying tribute to the brand's design heritage, Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh returns to the Monogram pattern this season, creating this Multiple wallet using the brand's iconic Monogram canvas paired with natural leather. This wallet features multiple pockets and inner compartments, maintaining a compact size while offering practical internal space, easily fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm ~

items.name_en: Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
❒ Size: 23.5*13.5*4cm ❒
A classic adaptation of the Mahjong bag, retaining the original style with a simple and elegant look. The portable carrying method and upgraded capacity meet the storage needs for essential items while traveling. Includes an extra internal pocket!
Small and lightweight, the chain strap design is eye-catching. A truly legendary piece!
Another blockbuster from the Fa Bao series; the design is truly top-tier!

items.name_en: 24ss New Hula Hoop~❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥 Full of rich girl vibes❤️ Sophisticated black and pure white highlight a simple yet noble style~🤩 Rounded curves are both feminine and modern, easy to carry and looks playful~ Compared to the old model, the new gold chain element and bow element are more elegant and charming~
items.name_cn: 24ss New Hula Hoop~❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥 Full of rich girl vibes❤️ Sophisticated black and pure white highlight a simple yet noble style~🤩 Rounded curves are both feminine and modern, easy to carry and looks playful~ Compared to the old model, the new gold chain element and bow element are more elegant and charming~

items.name_en: Chanel 24s Hula Hoop is a must-buy black and gold item😎 This one really offers great value, the bag is very light, and the chain is even lighter. The cute bow is truly versatile😍😍😍 The bag capacity is absolutely amazing, can fit an iPhone Pro Max🥹🥹🥹 I DIY'd a pearl chain + vintage gold buckle to turn it into a dual-use cute bag😍😍😍 Black and gold calfskin is worth a rush...... Looking forward to the same style pink hula hoop and Tangyuan Pearl mini CF, pearlescent pink, the real thing
